title: pasania edulis
intro: Pasania edulis, also known as Pasania edulis or Pasania, is a type of tropical tree found in the Pacific Islands, belonging to the Mahogany family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains tannins and other compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pasania edulis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Pasania edulis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the bark is steeped in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
